meta.name: Juan José Cano Duque
meta.title: Software Engineer · QA Automation Lead · AI Driven.
meta.bio: A decade of building, breaking, and automating production systems — from team-led Java backends to AI-powered tooling for global brands. Driven by a hunger to keep learning, ship quality at scale, and let machines handle the boring parts.
meta.availability: Open to new opportunities — Available now · Global remote · EOR-friendly

ui.documentTitle: Juan José Cano Duque — Curriculum Vitae

stats.label: Industries · Streaming, Aviation, Finance, Edu, AI
Continents shipped to · NA, EU, LATAM

items.title: Embed agentic AI across your dev cycle.
items.body: Rewire SDLC loops — dev, testing, code review, releases — around agentic primitives. Daily drivers, not pilot decks.

items.title: Build the tools that fit your stack.
items.body: Slash commands, hooks, MCP servers, internal CLIs. New AI tech ships weekly; I integrate it so the team feels the speed, not the friction.

items.title: Transform workflows for your customers.
items.body: Same playbook, applied to the teams you serve. Embed, ship the change, leave behind workflows that compound.

bullets: AI-Augmented Development: executed high-stakes workflows inside a demanding agentic AI environment serving the international financial industry.
SDLC optimization via agents: leveraged AI agents as the primary interface across the full software lifecycle — building, testing, debugging and rapid issue resolution.
Feature delivery with agents: shipped new product features by orchestrating AI agent tools to keep velocity and precision high in a complex landscape.
Technical resilience: thrived in a fast-paced, high-pressure setting, consistently meeting the rigorous security and performance standards of global fintech.
Designed and implemented a new UI testing framework for a complex, multi-team airline product.
Acted as QA focal point, leading integration and stakeholder relationships across multiple teams.
Improved integrations across GitHub Actions, BrowserStack, WDIO 9 and internal libraries.
Already integrating AI tooling into QA workflows before it became mainstream.
Led the strategic refactor of a metadata automation framework — +20% faster execution, +30% faster test development.
Directed QA best practices rollout, increasing stakeholder confidence in the testing process.
Interviewed and onboarded engineers to grow the team.
Designed and executed automation strategies for a cluster of critical APIs and UIs using Python & Selenium.
Pioneered and led new automation projects with Playwright.
Led a small team building a full ERP suite — digital invoicing, inventory, purchases, sales and payroll — in Java.
Built a municipal public lighting management system using PHP and the Google GPS API.

items.title: Sign-language transcription model
items.body: Fine-tuned a sign-language transcription model for an NGO in Argentina — early hands-on work with vision models for real-world social impact.

items.title: Student-facing RAG chatbot
items.body: Built and shipped a RAG system currently running in production as a student-facing chatbot for a university in Colombia.

items.title: Agentic dev cycle, end to end
items.body: Mastered agentic AI tools across the full development cycle as an SDET — building, fixing, and orchestrating solutions across the codebase, not just filing tickets.

skills.label: § 04 — Toolkit
skills.note: Honest read on where I am today — calibrated by what I touch most, not by what looks best on paper.

degrees.title: Master — Data Science
degrees.body: Focused on data analysis & ML modeling — the foundation behind production RAG and fine-tuning work that followed.

degrees.title: Bachelor's Degree — Computer Science
degrees.body: Strength in algorithms — the backbone behind framework design and performance refactors.

quote.text: I write production code, and I know how to test it. Building, automating, and optimizing is something I genuinely enjoy doing.
